title: matelea matogrossensis
intro: Matelea matogrossensis, also known as the Matogrossensis Milking Vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the release of milk in lactating women, which is where it gets its name. The health benefits of Matelea matogrossensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of menstrual cramps, uterine stimulation, and as a natural remedy for postpartum recovery. Herbal preparations of Matelea matogrossensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots, leaves, and stems, and can be consumed as teas, capsules, or tinctures.
